properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've got a river of living water A fountain that never will run dry It's an open heaven you're releasing And we will never be denied

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: 'Cause we're stirring up deep-deep wells, We're stirring up deep-deep waters We're gonna dance in the river, dance in the river 'Cause we're stirring up deep-deep wells, We're stirring up deep-deep waters We're gonna jump in the river, jump in the river

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Deep cries out, deep cries out to you Deep cries out, deep cries out to you We cry out, we cry out to you, Jesus

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: 'Cause we're stirring up deep-deep wells, We're stirring up deep-deep waters We're gonna dance in the river, dance in the river 'Cause we're stirring up deep-deep wells We're stirring up deep-deep waters We're gonna jump in the river, jump in Everybody singing!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: Deep cries out, deep cries out to you Deep cries out, deep cries out to you We cry out, we cry out to you, Jesus :/

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We're falling into deeper waters, calling out to you We're walking into deeper waters, going after you

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And if He goes to the left then we'll go to the left, And if He goes to the right then we'll go to the right We're gonna jump-jump, jump-jump in the river, Jump-jump, jump-jump, everybody.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: If He goes to the left then we'll go to the left, And if He goes to the right then we'll go to the right We're gonna dance-dance, dance-dance in the river, Dance-dance, dance-dance, everybody

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: If He goes to the left then we'll go to the left, And if He goes to the right then we'll go to the right We're gonna jump-jump, jump-jump in the river, Jump-jump, jump-jump everybody.

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: If He goes to the left then we'll go to the left, And if He goes to the right then we'll go to the right We're gonna shout-shout, shout-shout in the river Shout-shout, shout-shout, yeah!
